sfmflow.configuration.background.tooltip: The hexadecimal color string (#RRGGBB) used for background panels and borders.

sfmflow.configuration.colors.tooltip: Customize the hexadecimal background and label colors of your canvas nodes.
sfmflow.configuration.cyan.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the cyan mask.
sfmflow.configuration.enableDebugLogging: Enables verbose diagnostic logging of physical network BFS scans inside the server console.
sfmflow.configuration.forceGuiScale.tool: Force a specific GUI scale when opening the Machine Inventory Manager screen. Set to 0 to use standard adaptive auto-scaling.
sfmflow.configuration.general.tooltip: Configure core client UI rendering and scaling behaviors.
sfmflow.configuration.gray.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the gray mask.
sfmflow.configuration.green.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the green mask.
sfmflow.configuration.light_blue.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the light_blue mask.
sfmflow.configuration.light_gray.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the light_gray mask.
sfmflow.configuration.lime.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the lime mask.
sfmflow.configuration.limits.tooltip: Configure scanning thresholds and workspace restrictions to protect server performance.
sfmflow.configuration.magenta.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the magenta mask.
sfmflow.configuration.maxCableLength.too: The maximum distance (in cable blocks) that the network scanner is allowed to search from the Manager block.
sfmflow.configuration.maxComponentAmount: The maximum number of flow control components/nodes that can be placed on a single Manager layout canvas.
sfmflow.configuration.maxConnectedInvent: The absolute maximum number of chest/container inventories that a Manager block is allowed to connect to via cable scanning.
sfmflow.configuration.maxExecutionBudget: The maximum time budget (in microseconds) per Manager block per tick to execute transfer tasks.
sfmflow.configuration.maxIntervalTicks.t: The absolute maximum duration (in ticks) allowed for Interval Triggers.
sfmflow.configuration.maxNestedGroupDept: The maximum allowable folder hierarchy nesting depth inside the manager.
sfmflow.configuration.minIntervalTicks.t: The absolute minimum duration (in ticks) allowed for Interval Triggers.
sfmflow.configuration.networkScanCooldow: The minimum tick duration/cooldown required between consecutive physical cable network scans.
sfmflow.configuration.orange.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the orange mask.
sfmflow.configuration.pink.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the pink mask.
sfmflow.configuration.purple.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the purple mask.
sfmflow.configuration.red.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the red mask.
sfmflow.configuration.section.sfmflow.se: Configure scanning thresholds and workspace restrictions to protect server performance.
sfmflow.configuration.text.tooltip: The hexadecimal color string (#RRGGBB) used for text labels and node headers.
sfmflow.configuration.title: SFM-Flow Client Configurations
sfmflow.configuration.white.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the white mask.
sfmflow.configuration.yellow.tooltip: Custom color overrides for the yellow mask.
